headline: Coca-Cola (KO) Halts Fairlife Production After Ransomware Attack Hits U.S. Systems
summary: Coca-Cola temporarily halted U.S. Fairlife dairy production after a ransomware attack hit its production systems. The incident affects Fairlife operations and may disrupt product availability while systems are restored. The event raises new questions about cybersecurity, supply chain resilience, and operational risk at Coca-Cola. Coca-Cola, traded as NYSE:KO, is dealing with this Fairlife disruption while its stock trades at $81.56. The share price sits alongside returns of 18.0% year to...

headline: Another popular soda giant closes warehouse operation, cuts 184 jobs
summary: A warehouse shift in Tulsa will result in 184 job cuts, even as production lines beside it continue to operate. TheStreet recently reported that Coca-Cola is closing a Massachusetts bottling plant, while Mars-owned Nature’s Bakery is transferring production from a Missouri facility to other ...

headline: The Portfolio That Gives You a $2,000 Raise Every Year
summary: Most investors chase the biggest yield they can find, but the portfolio that actually grows your income year after year is built on a completely different logic. Here is how dividend math quietly delivers something that usually requires a performance review.

raw.headline: The Portfolio That Gives You a $2,000 Raise Every Year

headline: 3 Dividend Stocks That Have Survived Every Market Crash in July
summary: July has a long history of punishing investors who mistake a good run for a durable business. Three Dividend Kings have kept raising their payouts through every major crash since 1987, and all three just delivered beat-and-raise quarters heading into a summer that already feels shaky.

raw.headline: 3 Dividend Stocks That Have Survived Every Market Crash in July

headline: If Volatility Stays Low, Here’s What Happens to DIVO’s Monthly Income
summary: DIVO's covered-call strategy looks solid on paper, but two macro forces are quietly working against its monthly payouts in ways most income investors overlook. Here is what the options chain and the Treasury market are signaling right now.
